# Awesome Prompting Hacks
> A programmatic catalog of 5042 optimized, production-ready prompts designed for OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini models.

## Core Documentation
- [Home](https://zion369369.github.io/awesome-prompting-hacks/): The primary interactive search interface.
- [Sitemap Index](https://zion369369.github.io/awesome-prompting-hacks/sitemap-index.xml): XML index for structural search crawlers.
- [OpenAPI Specification](https://zion369369.github.io/awesome-prompting-hacks/swagger.json): Swagger OpenAPI definition.
